# pihole_dhcp_static_lease (Resource)

Manages a DHCP static lease (reservation) in PiHole.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address to assign to the device.
- `mac` (String) The MAC address of the device.

### Optional

- `hostname` (String) Optional hostname for the device.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite ID in format mac:ip.
